title: ocotea coriacea
intro: Ocotea coriacea, also known as the "Ecuadorian Sandalo" or "Red Sandalwood", is a species of evergreen tree native to the Andes Mountains in South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ocotea coriacea include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system, as well as its traditional use in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. Ocotea coriacea is often used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, teas, and capsules, which are available in health food stores and online.
